allow: Bash(mysql -u root skylara -e "SELECT u.id, u.email, r.name as role_name FROM User u JOIN UserRole ur ON ur.userId = u.id JOIN Role r ON r.id = ur.roleId WHERE u.email = 'admin@skylara.dev';")
Bash(mysql -u root skylara -e "SELECT u.id, u.email, r.name as role_name FROM users u JOIN user_roles ur ON ur.userId = u.id JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.roleId WHERE u.email = 'admin@skylara.dev';")

Bash(mysql -u root skylara -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_users FROM users; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_loads FROM loads; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_slots FROM slots; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_incidents FROM incidents; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_aircraft FROM aircrafts; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_dropzones FROM dropzones; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_roles FROM roles; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_transactions FROM transactions; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_wallets FROM wallets; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total_gear FROM gear_items;")
